name: Independent Comprehensive Technical Audit
description: Independent audit and remediation strategy for top 5 critical technical debt items.

phases.name: Theme Architecture Refactoring
phases.description: Reduction of bloated theme presets and enforcement of the Section Pattern.

phases.name: File Naming Standardization
phases.description: Normalization of component filenames to kebab-case.

phases.name: SCSS-to-CSS Token Alignment
phases.description: Migration of static SCSS variables to reactive CSS Variable tokens.

phases.name: Backend Security & RLS Hardening
phases.description: Reduction of service role abuse in repository layers.

phases.name: Design System & Utility Cleanup
phases.description: Deprecation of ad-hoc layout utilities in favor of semantic tokens.
